reference: I have been experiencing an ongoing mild headache. It feels like a heaviness on the top of my head, and I see blurry at times. Sometimes it is hard to think, and I lose my train of thought; I might be saying something and then forget what I was about to say, and my mind goes completely blank. Should I be worried, or is it just a head cold or sinus issue?
text: I have been experiencing going mild headache. It feels like a heaviness on the top of my head, and I see blurry at times. Sometimes it is hard to think, and I lose my train of thought. I might be saying something and then forget what I was about to say, and my mind goes completely blank. Should I be worried, or is it just a head cold or sinus issue?
